settings.subscription_details:
• Free shipping in the US
  • Recurring savings on each order
  • Pause, update frequency or cancel anytime by logging into your account and clicking ‘Manage Subscriptions’ under ‘Account Details’

settings.question: Do you ship overseas?
settings.answer: Yes, we ship all over the world. Shipping costs will apply, and will be added at checkout. We run discounts and promotions all year, so stay tuned for exclusive deals.

settings.question: What If I dont like It?
settings.answer: We offer a 30 day Hassle Free Money Back Guarantee! If you don't like It, you can return It for a refund.

settings.question: Do you have samples?
settings.answer: We do not currently have samples, we plan on having samples made once we launch more flavors.

settings.question: How long will it take to get my orders?
settings.answer: It depends on where you are. Orders processed here will take 5-7 business days to arrive. Overseas deliveries can take anywhere from 7-16 days. Delivery details will be provided in your confirmation email.

settings.question: Where are you located?
settings.answer: We are located In California and have a warehouse In Wisconsin, where we employ a team of 20+ plus people to ship out orders within 24 hours or less!
